provisions.content:
FINANCIAL MARKETS ACT (OTC DERIVATIVES,
CENTRAL COUNTERPARTIES AND
TRADE REPOSITORIES

[ L.S.345.17

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 345.17
REGOLAMENTI DWAR FINANCIAL MARKETS ACT
(OTC DERIVATIVES, CENTRAL COUNTERPARTIES
AND TRADE REPOSITORIES)*
1 ta Marzu, 2013;
11 ta’ Ottubru, 2013
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 81 tal-2013, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 431 tal-2018.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
